working_on: Issue #86 — Revert/rollback discipline ops-doc. Author new engine/operations/revert-and-rollback-discipline.md + engine ADR 0078 (with Alternatives Considered section per ADR 0077) documenting revert procedure, interactions with routine_lifecycle_push.py / build_lifecycle_push.py / routine_eager_claim_recovery.py / apply_migration.py / ADR supersession / MemPalace drawers, hotfix flow. Premise correction discovered at boot: Issue body's 'verify revert: in validate.py allowed types' is wrong — validate.py does not validate commit subjects; the gate is in the lifecycle wrappers (DELIVERABLE_SUBJECT_RE); disposition is no code change because reverts route through PR flow per the Issue body's own framing. Cascade: README index, cross-references.md, CLAUDE.md topical pointers, code-discipline.md See-also, migration-discipline.md See-also, ENGINE_LOG [Unreleased], STATE.md.
